name_cn: 媒体制作文学学士（荣誉）
degree_title: Bachelor of Arts with Honours (BA Hons)
department: Faculty of Arts and Humanities — School of Art, Design & Media
admission_requirements: A-Levels: BBC. BTEC: DMM. International Baccalaureate: 31+. GCSE: Minimum 5 GCSEs graded 9-4 / A*-C including English and Mathematics.

language_requirements.english: IELTS 6.0 overall (minimum 5.5 in each component) or equivalent

application_process: Apply through UCAS. Coventry University UCAS institution code: C85. Course code available on the UCAS website.

application_deadlines.notes: Applications for September entry are managed through UCAS. Late applications may be considered until June 30 if places are available.

curriculum_summary: Year 1: Key concepts in communication, media and culture; media practice; researching for media production; convergent media; broadcast media; professional development planning 1; Add+vantage module. Year 2: Genre, meaning and production; professional experience (optional work placement); professional development planning 2; Add+vantage module; plus optional modules for specialisation in practice or production routes. Year 3: Context and analysis; genre, meaning and production 2; research and development; media production (major project — research, develop and produce a substantial media product in the medium of choice); professional development planning 3; Add+vantage module. An optional sandwich year (placement) is available between Year 2 and Year 3.

tuition.notes: UK students: £9,250/year. International students: £19,850/year (2025/26). Sandwich year placement fee: £1,250.

scholarship_info: Coventry University offers a range of scholarships for international students including the Global Leaders Scholarship and country-specific scholarships. See the university website for details.
